name: testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalyseViolationData
title: testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalyseViolationData
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalyseViolationData(ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, long errorNo, ScopeDutyCycleDefinition dutyCycle, ScopeBitDataDutyCycle cycleData, ScopeSerialBitAnalysisViolationData data);
description: Returns the duty cycle data and the violation data of the serial bit analysis for the error number.

parameters.name: errorNo
parameters.description: The error number the data are requested.

parameters.name: dutyCycle
parameters.description: The duty cycle measurement parameters. See ScopeDutyCycleDefintion.

parameters.name: cycleData
parameters.description: The duty cycle data for the defined bit. See ScopeBitDataDutyCycle.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The serial bit analysis violation data for the error number. See ScopeSerialBitAnalysisViolationData.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
